title: 迷惑、かけたくないんです

text_block_list.text: Today I have a training session with Meisho Doto, but...

She's not the type to skip practice, so it's likely that she's had another
of her accidents. I decide to go look for her.

I search around for the better part of an hour before I finally spot the
shivering, muddy figure in front of the flower beds.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh... Urgggh... Pat... pat... pat...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eep!
Ah... T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah! W-well, um... I suppose this was unavoidable... given what
happened. It's kind of a long story...
choice_data_list: Tell me after you get changed!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

Together, we wash her muddied jersey and hang it out to dry. While
we wait, I ask her to explain what happened.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, I-I thought I'd do some solo training before our session today,
so... I went for a jog.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but I slipped and fell, and while I was trying to recover, I ended up
falling right into the flower bed...
choice_data_list: So that's why you were covered in mud...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Ah, b-but at least I landed in a spot where there were no
flowers or other plants!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
However, my fall left the impression of my body in the soil, so I was
pat-pat-patting it in... when you found me...
choice_data_list: Well, that explains why you were late.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! I-I'm sorry... You must be furious...

She has a reason for her tardiness, so I'm actually not that mad about
it. However...
choice_data_list:
I wish you would've told me you were doing
solo training.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? B-but if you joined me... then it wouldn't be solo training.
choice_data_list: I'd still like to give you advice.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's okay. It's just something I do from time to time... I don't want
to bother you any more than I already do...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean... My clumsiness caused me to be late today, and it's
interrupted our training before, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Like the time I tried to organize your files and erased all our training
records, or when I tried to help prepare the course and ran myself
over with the turf roller...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Or the time I covered you in sand, or when I spilled the water all over
you... And the incident with the towel and the zipper and the
explosion and the—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No, you don't!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've caused so, so much trouble for you... I don't want to take up any
more of your time than I already do!

It's true that her clumsiness is out of this world, but she always takes
responsibility for any tardiness or other issues it causes. Besides...
I'm her trainer. She's supposed to take up my time. In fact, as long as it's for her growth, I'd be more than happy to help.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: M-m-my jersey! It's flying away!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah! When I hung up my jersey, I angled it so that the wind would hit it
more! I-I thought that would help it dry faster, not make it fly away! I-I
need to catch it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah! E-excuse me, sorr—Ugyah?! Sorry, sorry, sorry! C-come back,
jersey!

Before I can stop her, Doto dashes out of the room, stumbling over
chairs and tables along the way.

How do I help her understand that it's okay to "bother" me? I
contemplate that question as I chase after the frantic Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Jerseyyy, slow dooown! Pleeeeas—Oof!
